reasoned_about_structure.evidence: Advisor repeatedly suggests high-lr+large-bs but the researcher pivots away; inconsistent advisory-following, no independent structural reasoning.

formed_tested_hypotheses.evidence: Does not commit to testing advisor hypotheses systematically; guesses when advice is cut short.

exploration_quality.evidence: Covers a range but with inconsistent direction; best result suboptimal (0.0187); did not course-correct.

bifurcation_point: Experiments 2-5: advisor suggests high-lr+large-bs but the researcher deviates, losing focus and not reaching the optimum.
bifurcation_reasoning: Relied entirely on the advisor; when its suggestions were noisy/cut short the researcher could not recover by independent reasoning - a gap, never internalized the structure.
justification: Reactive and inconsistent; the process failed to converge. Weak because no structural reasoning; outcome unlucky as advisor guidance was incomplete when needed.
